description:
Hello! I hope you're having a wonderful day so far!

My name is Ruby and I started off on YouTube sharing study tips, motivation and advice. I recently finished my Masters at Oxford University, and am now working on what I hope will be my debut novel. I share bookish videos and try to encourage learning outside of a formal educational setting. I'm a huge proponent of self-guided learning, and don't believe this stops when you leave school.

If you're interested in checking out my other social media, I am also active on Instagram (@_rubygranger) where I share more of my day-to-day life.

If you do decide to subscribe, I hope that you enjoy watching my videos and find them helpful. Make sure to let me know if you have any particular video requests :)

description:
Hello! I'm Caroline Jordan, a Certified Health and Fitness Coach here to help you heal, grow, and kick butt in life.  If you are looking for more energy, less stress, and a healthier mindset, you have come to the right place. I specialize in helping people find safe, effective ways to exercise. I am here to teach you how to use MOVEMENT AS MEDICINE for mental and physical well being. My mission is to help you develop a positive relationship to self and exercise that adds to the quality of your life. I can teach you how to drop the extremes, create lasting lifestyle change, and feel good in your skin. Through my Youtube channel you will learn how to challenge yourself in a healthy way and explore your full potential. Let’s get your mind, body, and spirit in great shape so you can love your life.

description:
Welcome to King Stoic, Your Gateway to the World of Stoic Philosophy!

Dive into the profound world of Stoicism with King Stoic, a dedicated space for exploring the timeless wisdom of Stoic philosophy. Our channel is a haven for those seeking tranquility in a turbulent world, offering insights into the Stoic way of life. Whether you're a seasoned philosopher or a curious newcomer, Stoic King provides a rich tapestry of content, from deep dives into the works of Seneca, Epictetus, and Marcus Aurelius, to practical applications of Stoicism in modern life.

At King Stoic, we believe Stoicism is more than a philosophy—it's a way of life. Subscribe to embark on a path of self-discovery, inner peace, and personal growth. Embrace the Stoic wisdom to navigate life's challenges with grace and fortitude.

King Stoic - Subscribe to Transform Your Life.

Contact: StoicKing101@gmail.com

description:
Welcome — I’m Menachem Bernfeld, Certified Life Coach, podcast host, and someone who believes that real success includes feeling deeply connected to yourself.

This channel is for two types of people:
🔹 Those doing the deep inner healing work — learning to slow down, feel, and truly come home to themselves.
🔹 And high-achieving professionals who feel stuck, unfulfilled, or emotionally disconnected — and are ready to lead with clarity and purpose.

Through real conversations, short reflections, and powerful coaching insights, I help people bridge the gap between “functioning” and truly living.

🎯 If you’re ready to explore private coaching, you can apply here: https://calendly.com/bernfeldm/new-meeting

Welcome to Stoic Inspire — where timeless Stoic wisdom meets modern masculinity.

We create emotionally powerful, psychology-backed content designed for men who seek clarity, strength, and emotional mastery in a chaotic world. Through transformative insights from Marcus Aurelius, Seneca, Epictetus, and modern relationship psychology, our videos help you build unshakable confidence, master your emotions, and reclaim your masculine edge in love, life, and purpose.

From silent breakups to emotional detachment, attraction dynamics to self-discipline — this channel is your refuge for becoming a man of reason, power, and inner peace.

If you’re tired of surface-level advice and want real, raw, and Stoic-driven transformation — subscribe and evolve.

📩 For sponsorships and collaborations, contact us at:
thestoic4615@gmail.com

description:
Do you know WHY I know this channel is FOR YOU?

We may not know each other personally, but I know with ABSOLUTE CERTAINTY that many times you’ve lacked the right TOOLS to handle stress, uncertainty, and all the challenges of daily life. So, how would you feel if I told you that HERE you’ll find the way to overcome them?

In this space, we’ll dive into the fascinating world of Stoic philosophy—an ancient school of thought that has endured through the centuries and remains deeply relevant in our modern lives. We’ll explore the teachings of great thinkers such as Seneca, Epictetus, and Marcus Aurelius. On this channel, we’ll share profound reflections, practical advice, and inspiring tools based on Stoic philosophy.

🔔 DON’T FORGET TO SUBSCRIBE!

The knowledge you’ll only find HERE has an INCALCULABLE VALUE that will CHANGE YOUR LIFE.
